input_example: Known supplier with invoice number amount VAT due date and document link
expected_result: Status can move to Ready for Review with owner and next action

input_example: Invoice from supplier with VAT amount but no supplier VAT number
expected_result: Status becomes Missing Info and next action requests VAT number

input_example: Invoice number or amount matches existing supplier record
expected_result: Status becomes Possible Duplicate and approval is blocked until reviewed

input_example: Unknown/new supplier above approval threshold
expected_result: Status becomes Waiting for Approval and owner must approve supplier before filing/payment readiness

input_example: Invoice due within 48 hours
expected_result: Item escalates with due-soon note and owner next action

input_example: Approved invoice with document link and folder link
expected_result: Status can move to Filed with correct naming convention

input_example: Tracker has received approved missing duplicate filed records
expected_result: Weekly report counts match tracker status counts

input_example: Urgent website or WhatsApp lead
expected_result: Status becomes Needs Response with owner and same-day/urgent next action

input_example: Lead contacted and response time captured
expected_result: Status moves from Needs Response to Contacted or Waiting for Client

input_example: Quote sent with amount and sent date
expected_result: Follow-up due date is set within 24 to 48 hours

input_example: Quote follow-up due date passes without action
expected_result: Status becomes Follow-up Due or overdue appears in report

input_example: Lead becomes Lost or Cold
expected_result: Reason is captured before weekly report

input_example: Tracker has new contacted quoted won lost overdue records
expected_result: Weekly report counts match tracker status counts and open quote value

input_example: Accepted client or package is added
expected_result: Status becomes New Client with owner and welcome next action

input_example: Welcome sent and documents requested
expected_result: Status becomes Documents Requested with checklist items

input_example: Required document missing after request
expected_result: Status remains Waiting for Client or Documents Requested with owner and follow-up date

input_example: Documents received agreement signed payment verified folder created handover complete
expected_result: Status can move to Ready to Start

input_example: Agreement/payment/folder/handover incomplete
expected_result: Status cannot move to Active

input_example: Tracker has active stuck waiting payment pending clients
expected_result: Weekly report counts match tracker status counts and missing-document checklist

input_example: Admin person receives tracker SOP report template and checklist
expected_result: Admin person can explain daily routine and statuses without founder help

input_example: Workflow has not passed manual tests yet
expected_result: No automation is added that bypasses human approval
